lead_profile_text: 2-bed unfurnished house, Hanley, Stoke-on-Trent. Currently tenanted (family with young children), leaving mid-to-late July 2026. Property not recently inspected — condition unknown. Setup quote SQ-2026-062: £5,280 (2-bed full furnished). Bills ~£400/month owner responsibility. Kuldip actively looking to buy more properties for STL expansion. REVISED intelligence entry with full Deal Analyser data.
emotional_profile: Expansion-minded lead — first property is gateway to a portfolio relationship. Primary gate is income consistency (verbatim). Cost and bills transparency signals she is building a detailed business case. Fast conversion critical given 1 July offer deadline.
delay_trigger_phrases: completely unfurnished — will require full setup
delay_timeline: Tenant out mid-to-late July; setup August; realistic go-live September 2026
green_light_trigger_phrases: actively looking to buy more properties

top_objections.text: Income consistency — 'Can I expect consistent income every month?' (verbatim primary concern)
top_objections.zac_response: Monthly breakdown: £1,084 (Jan) to £2,129 (Aug). October half term / Alton Towers at ~£1,928 net used as urgency anchor. All months above £400/month bills.

top_objections.text: Want to understand the full costs before committing
top_objections.zac_response: Bills ~£400/month (gas, electric, water, WiFi, council tax — owner responsibility). Setup quote SQ-2026-062: £5,280 for full 2-bed furnishing. Management fee 13%+VAT, £42/month software.

top_questions.text: What markets work well for STL portfolio expansion?
top_questions.answer: Manchester: strong. Liverpool: good weekends, weak weekdays — selective. Leeds: strong. Scotland: ruled out due to licensing requirements and costs. General rule: cities near hospitals, universities, and transport hubs.

top_questions.text: What are the ongoing bills and costs once live?
top_questions.answer: ~£400/month (gas, electric, water, WiFi, council tax — all owner responsibility). Plus management fee 13%+VAT and £42/month software applied to gross revenue.

what_moved_them: Specific monthly range (£1,084–£2,129) helped ground the income picture
October half term / Alton Towers anchor as first realistic strong peak event
Flexibility to sell while managing on STL — directly relevant to her situation
Expansion portfolio angle — other cities performing well matched her growth mindset
13%+VAT offer with clear deadline and portfolio fee progression path (15% → 13% → 12%)

conversion_gaps.gap: Unfurnished property requires £5,280 setup investment before going live
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Share setup guide; confirm September go-live still captures October Alton Towers half-term peak at ~£1,928 net.

conversion_gaps.gap: Tenant timeline creates 6–8 week delay before property is available
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Maintain momentum with document review and setup planning. Confirm exact tenant move-out date ASAP to lock the go-live timeline.

offer_framing: 13%+VAT expires 1 July 2026. October half term / Alton Towers as first peak anchor. Portfolio fee progression (15% → 13% → 12%) as long-term expansion lever. Sign now, go live in September.
zac_close_phrase: Sign before 1 July to lock in 13% — September go-live still captures October Alton Towers half term as your first strong peak
zac_income_intro: Y1 net £15,788 / Y2 net £19,735. Nightly £159 at 65% occupancy. Range £1,084 (January) to £2,129 (August). All months comfortably above £400/month bills.
zac_transition_phrases: October half term — Alton Towers is 20 minutes away, that's your first real peak at ~£1,928 net
Portfolio fee path: 15% for one property, 13% with the offer, 12% when you get to three properties
zac_reassurance_phrases: Even in January (lowest month) you're at £1,084 — more than double your £400/month bills
Sign now to lock in the rate — you don't need to be live until September
